title: AP Works — Qualification Criteria + Bid Capacity Formula
text_english: To QUALIFY for the award of this Contract, EACH BIDDER in its name SHALL HAVE — during the LAST FIVE YEARS preceding the financial year in which tenders are invited — (a) SATISFACTORILY COMPLETED as a PRIME CONTRACTOR similar works of value not less than {{similar_work_pct}}% (default 50%) of the Estimated Value of Contract, in any one year; (b) EXECUTED in any one year minimum quantities of principal items (typically {{quantity_pct}}% (default 50%) of expected peak quantities of construction per year) — including Cement Concrete, RCC, PSC, and Earth Work in both excavation and embankment. EACH BIDDER SHALL FURTHER DEMONSTRATE: (i) AVAILABILITY (owned, leased, or to be procured against mobilisation advances) of KEY EQUIPMENT for this work; (ii) AVAILABILITY of KEY PERSONNEL with adequate experience; (iii) LIQUID ASSETS / CREDIT FACILITIES (credit lines / letters of credit / solvency certificates from Banks) equivalent to the estimated cash flow for {{liquid_assets_months}} (default 3) MONTHS in peak construction period; (iv) EMD in the shape of BANK GUARANTEE for {{emd_pct}}% (default 1%) of the estimated contract value, valid for the period of completion plus defect liability period. ONLY EXPERIENCE relating to works executed in STATE / CENTRAL GOVERNMENT departments OR State / Central Government undertakings shall be considered. Available Bid Capacity = (A × N × 2) − B; where A = Maximum value of civil engineering works executed in any one year during the last five years (price-updated at {{annual_price_weightage_pct}}% (default 10%) per year); N = Number of years for completion of the works for which tenders are invited; B = Value of existing commitments and ongoing works due during the same period. The bidder QUALIFIES only if the AVAILABLE BID CAPACITY is MORE THAN the ESTIMATED VALUE.

parameters.name: similar_work_pct
parameters.label: Similar Works Min Value (% of ECV)
